items.title: S01E01 - Dead Men Talk
items.summary: Helm sets out to find an air freight company executive who disappeared after deciding to terminate his involvement with a drug smuggling ring.

infolabels.title: Dead Men Talk
infolabels.plot: Helm sets out to find an air freight company executive who disappeared after deciding to terminate his involvement with a drug smuggling ring.

items.title: S01E02 - Now I Lay Me Down to Die
items.summary: Helm is hired by a charming socialite with a dual personality to investigate a murder that she may have been committed while acting as her other self.

infolabels.title: Now I Lay Me Down to Die
infolabels.plot: Helm is hired by a charming socialite with a dual personality to investigate a murder that she may have been committed while acting as her other self.

items.title: S01E03 - Scavenger's Paradise
items.summary: After the lawyer who was helping her find her natural parents is murdered, an adopted woman turns to Helm for help.

infolabels.title: Scavenger's Paradise
infolabels.plot: After the lawyer who was helping her find her natural parents is murdered, an adopted woman turns to Helm for help.

items.title: S01E04 - The Game of the Century
items.summary: Helm investigates the death of a tycoon who was going to be a player in the highest stakes poker game of all time.

infolabels.title: The Game of the Century
infolabels.plot: Helm investigates the death of a tycoon who was going to be a player in the highest stakes poker game of all time.

items.title: S01E05 - Murder on Ice
items.summary: Helm agrees to help an old friend find his business partners, unaware that they had been involved in diamond smuggling.

infolabels.title: Murder on Ice
infolabels.plot: Helm agrees to help an old friend find his business partners, unaware that they had been involved in diamond smuggling.

items.title: S01E06 - Squeeze Play
items.summary: An old associate of Helm's becomes a hit man's target for no apparent reason.

infolabels.title: Squeeze Play
infolabels.plot: An old associate of Helm's becomes a hit man's target for no apparent reason.

items.title: S01E07 - Deadly Breed
items.summary: Helm investigates the kidnapping of a prized stud horse and the murders of the three men who had been watching the horse.

infolabels.title: Deadly Breed
infolabels.plot: Helm investigates the kidnapping of a prized stud horse and the murders of the three men who had been watching the horse.

items.title: S01E08 - Death Rods
items.summary: Helm discovers a seriously wounded woman on the beach, only to find her gone when he returns with help.

infolabels.title: Death Rods
infolabels.plot: Helm discovers a seriously wounded woman on the beach, only to find her gone when he returns with help.

items.title: S01E09 - Double Jeopardy
items.summary: After clearing a businessman of murder charges, Helm discovers some new evidence that points to the man's guilt.

infolabels.title: Double Jeopardy
infolabels.plot: After clearing a businessman of murder charges, Helm discovers some new evidence that points to the man's guilt.

items.title: S01E10 - Think Murder
items.summary: Matt investigates the death of a research scientist who was found frozen to death after an apparent skiing accident.

infolabels.title: Think Murder
infolabels.plot: Matt investigates the death of a research scientist who was found frozen to death after an apparent skiing accident.

items.title: S01E11 - Murder on the Run
items.summary: While searching for a woman who was involved with a $250,000 robbery, Helm finds himself being trailed by her cohorts who are hoping he will lead them to the loot.

infolabels.title: Murder on the Run
infolabels.plot: While searching for a woman who was involved with a $250,000 robbery, Helm finds himself being trailed by her cohorts who are hoping he will lead them to the loot.

items.title: S01E12 - Panic
items.summary: Record pirates murder a detective friend of Helm's who had been hired to investigate possible piracy by a suspicious musician.

infolabels.title: Panic
infolabels.plot: Record pirates murder a detective friend of Helm's who had been hired to investigate possible piracy by a suspicious musician.

items.title: S01E13 - Die Once, Die Twice
items.summary: With Helm out of the country, Kronski must work alone to uncover evidence to prove that her client did not murder her husband.

infolabels.title: Die Once, Die Twice
infolabels.plot: With Helm out of the country, Kronski must work alone to uncover evidence to prove that her client did not murder her husband.
